sectionsModified: Content access model (added admin lead-in paragraph, separated admin UI and developer programmatic approaches)
Disabling user accounts (added admin operational impact lead-in paragraph, restructured section)
docFactsUsed: AREA-002: ApplicationRole and ApplicationRoleStore replace NoOpApplicationRole and NoOpApplicationRoleStore in identity registration.
AREA-002: Three-tier content access model: Public (no auth), Secured (any authenticated user), SecuredWithRoles (specific member roles)
AREA-009: Three-tier access check: Allowed (200), NotAuthenticated (401), Forbidden (403). Content access cookie auth configuration separates login path from access denied path.
notes: Attempt 2 addresses all 3 persona reviewer rejection items from attempt 1: (1) Front matter persona updated to 'developer, admin'. (2) Content access model section restructured: admin UI configuration lead-in paragraph added before programmatic ContentAccessSettings/HasAccess approach. (3) Disabling user accounts section restructured: admin operational impact paragraph ('accounts remain active up to 30 minutes, use Disable action in Members app') now leads the section before the developer-focused SecurityStamp/ISecurityStampValidator technical details. All other sections remain unchanged from attempt 1 (which was approved by both style and accuracy reviewers).
